Screen - Class in <Unnamed>
This class represent the user interface screen

selection(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in class RankSelection
This method takes an chromosomes Arraylist and makes Rank Selection on it and returns new chromosomes Arraylist

This method takes an chromosomes Arraylist and makes Roulette Wheel Selection on it and returns new chromosomes Arraylist
selection(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in interface SelectionBehavior
makes selection
selection(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in class TournamentSelection
This method takes an chromosomes Arraylist and makes Tournament Selection on it and returns new chromosomes Arraylist
selection(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in class Version1GA
This method makes roulette wheel selection
selection(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in class Version2GA
This method makes rank selection
selection(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in class Version3GA
This method makes tournament selection
SelectionBehavior - Interface in <Unnamed>
This is an interface for different Selection types

sets the GeneticAlgorithm type
setName(String) - Method in class Chromosome
 
setX1andX2(double, double) - Method in class Chromosome
 
start() - Method in class DynamicPlot
starts the algorithm and plotting
start() - Method in class GeneticAlgorithm
Template method
stop() - Method in class DynamicPlot
stops the algorithm and plotting
Subject - Interface in <Unnamed>
Subject interface that has register remove and notify observer methods
